description: Live consumer funnel for the 149 wellness assessment -> BHN consult -> primary-care handoff, PCI SAQ-A compliant. Go-live Aug 14. No PHI on the web tier; everything sits behind the signed-token redirect.

description: FIRST agentic dev task. Produce the technical spec: Next 16 App Router app structure; Drizzle schema for account/consent/payment/audit-log; the signed-token handoff seam contract; Stripe SAQ-A (PCI) boundary; env/secrets; GA4/HubSpot/Resend integration points. Output: architecture decision doc + schema draft. No PHI on web tier.

close_reason: Monorepo scaffold + CI complete (per branch tuily/monorepo-scaffold-ci, merged). Base CI/Vercel linking tracked under pbh-bws.5.
description:
Next.js 16 App Router, TS, Tailwind 4, ESLint, test runner, Vercel project link, base CI.

## Notes

Monorepo scaffold DONE on branch tuily/monorepo-scaffold-ci (pnpm workspaces + Turborepo + TS, per docs/sow2/technical/monorepo-plan.md):

* Migrated app -> apps/marketing (git mv, history preserved); scaffolded apps/funnel (:3001) consuming @pbh/ui.
* Packages: @pbh/ui (shared primitives + cn), @pbh/tokens (Tailwind4 theme.css), @pbh/types (handoff-token payload), @pbh/config (eslint base + tsconfig presets).
* Root: package.json (turbo scripts), pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json, base tsconfig, .prettierrc; switched npm->pnpm (removed package-lock).
  Verified: pnpm typecheck (all 4 ws), funnel build + prerender, marketing next build (all 14 routes), turbo orchestration, lint (ui/funnel clean).
  NOT done (deferred per user): base CI (.github workflow) and Vercel project link + Ignored Build Step. Vercel linking overlaps pbh-bws.5. Marketing 'tinacms build' needs TinaCloud creds/env (pbh-bws.5). Pre-existing marketing lint errors (unescaped quotes, <a> for / in Header/Footer, unused Icon in FAQ) are app-code, not migration-caused.

description: Neon Postgres Scale tier + BAA, Resend, Stripe account provisioning. Activation task (invoice 1A).
notes: HIPAA status check (2026-06-17, tuily): the Neon project 'primary-brain-health' (id frosty-waterfall-96849611, org Mark) is currently provisioned with hipaa=false on a basic/Launch-style tier (autoscaling 0.25-2 CU), NOT Scale tier with a BAA. Neon's HIPAA flag is gated behind a Scale+ plan and a signed BAA (see pbh-bws.13) - it cannot just be toggled on. Baseline funnel schema (users/consents/payments/audit_log) has been applied to this project's default branch for dev, but it must NOT hold real user PII until the Scale tier + BAA land. Action: upgrade project to Scale and execute the BAA before launch.
